findings.evidence: `rg -n "^(lemma|def|theorem|instance) " code/TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/JHolomorphic.lean` shows undocumented public lemmas at lines 102, 108, 114, 120, 126, 132, 138, 144, 150, 156, 162, 168, and 175.
findings.fix: Add short docstrings describing each result, especially the `choose`, `fderiv`, `fderivWithin`, and within/unrestricted conversion lemmas.
findings.issue: The public API lemmas from `isJHolomorphicOn_univ` through the derivative/within-at extraction lemmas are undocumented, despite being the advertised differentiability and `fderiv` commutation interface.

findings.evidence: The declarations `IsJHolomorphicAt.comp`, `IsJHolomorphicOn.mono`, `IsJHolomorphic.isJHolomorphicOn`, `isJHolomorphic_const`, `isJHolomorphic_id`, and `IsJHolomorphic.comp` appear without preceding docstrings in the added file.
findings.fix: Add docstrings to the public lemmas at lines 192, 200, 207, 213, 217, and 220 explaining the closure or conversion statement each provides.
findings.issue: The exported composition, monotonicity, setwise/global conversion, and global constant/identity lemmas are also undocumented, even though they form the main use API for the new predicates.

summary: The module and core predicates are documented, but several exported API lemmas added as part of the main user-facing interface have no docstrings.
